description: An execution result is any text artifact produced by running an execution prompt through a model. Ingested via `python automation/lumen.py ingest FILE`.

fields.source: Where this result came from (model name, tool, or manual)
fields.files_changed: List of files created or modified
fields.validation_status: Did any automated checks (tests, contracts) pass or fail?
fields.deviations: Anything the executor did that diverged from the execution prompt
fields.blockers: Errors, missing inputs, or ambiguities that stopped execution
fields.summary: 2-4 sentence summary of what was accomplished

note: This schema is informational. The ingest command accepts any text file — structured or free-form. Prefer structured summaries for cleaner next-task generation.
